race.comment: MOONWALK (7) lands here third-up from a short freshen following a strong performance behind a subsequent stakes winner last time out. Fiore hops back on board today, though she'll need a touch of luck from the barrier. Looks one on the rise though and she can go one better. BONDI LIFESAVER (4) won by 0.6L fresh when jumping favourite in stronger company. Back to a CL1 today and the rise in trip shouldn't be an issue. Looks ready to take the next step this campaign and he can repeat the dose. NICKELPLAY (8) comes here third-up and looks to be building into the campaign. Drawn ideally again and won't be far away. ROSENTREA (6) has returned in good order. Needs to go up another rung but deserves her chance.
